title: Jeevamruta (जीवामृत)
what: Jeevamruta ek jeevaanu khaad hai jo mitti ke andar laabhkari jeevaanuon ko badhata hai. Yeh mitti ko jeevit banata hai.
ingredients:
- 200 litre paani (1 drum)
- 10 kilo taza desi gaaon ka gobar
- 5-10 litre desi gaay ka gaumutra
- 2 kilo gur (ya ganne ka ras)
- 2 kilo besan (kisi bhi daal ka aata)
- 1 muthi khet ki mitti (jahan paudhe achhe ugein hain)
steps:
1. Drum mein 200 litre paani bharein
2. Gobar dalein aur achhe se milayein
3. Gaumutra dalein
4. Gur dalein aur ghol lein
5. Besan dalein
6. Ek muthi purani mitti dalein
7. Lakdi se achhe se hilayein — ek hi disha mein (clockwise)
8. Drum ko kapde se dhak dein — dhakkan se nahi
9. Din mein 2 baar hilayein (subah-sham)
10. 48 ghante (2 din) mein tayar
usage:
- 200 litre jeevamruta 1 acre ke liye kaafi hai
- Sinchai ke paani ke saath milayein ya seedha mitti par dalein
- Har 15 din mein dein
- Spray ke liye: chhan kar 10% ghol bana kar pattiyon par spray karein

title: Beejamruta (बीजामृत)
what: Beejamruta beej ka organic upchar hai jo beej ko fungus aur rog se bachata hai. Bina chemical ke beej ko suraksha deta hai.
ingredients:
- 20 litre paani
- 5 kilo desi gaay ka gobar
- 5 litre desi gaay ka gaumutra
- 50 gm chuna (lime)
- 1 muthi mitti
steps:
1. 20 litre paani mein gobar milayein
2. Gaumutra dalein aur achhe se milayein
3. Chuna alag paani mein ghol kar milayein
4. Ek muthi mitti dalein
5. Achhe se hilayein
6. Kapde se dhak kar 48 ghante rakhein
7. Din mein 2 baar hilayein
usage:
- Beej ko is ghol mein 20 minute bhigoyein
- Nikaal kar chhaanv mein sukhayein (dhoop mein nahi)
- Sukhne ke baad buwai karein
- 1 acre ke beej ke liye 20 litre kaafi hai

title: Panchagavya (पंचगव्य)
what: Panchagavya gaay ke 5 utpadon se banta hai. Yeh paudhe ki vriddhi badhata hai, phool-phal zyada aate hain, aur rog se ladta hai.
ingredients:
- 5 kilo taza desi gaay ka gobar
- 3 litre desi gaay ka gaumutra
- 2 litre desi gaay ka doodh
- 2 litre desi gaay ka dahi
- 1 litre desi ghee
- 3 litre ganne ka ras (ya 500gm gur paani mein ghol kar)
- 3 pake kele (mash karke)
- 2 litre nariyal paani (ya sada paani)
steps:
1. Ghee aur gobar ko mila kar 3 din tak rakhein — din mein 2 baar hilayein
2. Teesre din baaki sab cheezein milayein
3. Bade bartan mein rakhein — kapde se dhakein
4. Din mein subah-sham hilayein
5. 15 din mein tayar (khatmeetha gandh aayegi)
6. Chhan kar use karein
usage:
- Spray: 3% ghol (30ml per litre paani) pattiyon par
- Drench: 3% ghol jad mein
- Har 15 din mein spray karein
- Phool aane ke samay zaroor dein
- 10 litre panchagavya 1 acre ke liye spray mein kaafi

title: Neem Spray (नीम स्प्रे)
what: Neem spray keedo ko bhagata hai aur fungus se bhi bachata hai. Yeh sab se asaan aur zaroori organic spray hai.
ingredients:
- 5 litre paani
- 1 cup neem ke beej ka powder (ya 5ml neem tel)
- Chhota chamach sabun ka ghol (chipkane ke liye)
steps:
1. Neem beej ko peesein (ya neem tel lein)
2. 5 litre paani mein milayein
3. Raat bhar bhigone dein (beej powder ke liye)
4. Subah achhe se chhan lein kapde se
5. Thoda sabun ka paani milayein (1/2 chamach)
6. Spray pump mein bharein
usage:
- Pattiyon ke upar aur neeche dono taraf spray karein
- Har 5-7 din mein dohraye
- Keede dikhne par har 3 din mein karein
- Subah jaldi ya sham ko spray karein
- Dhoop mein spray na karein — neem ka asar kam hota hai

title: Ghana Jeevamruta (घन जीवामृत)
what: Ghana jeevamruta sukhi khaad hai jo mitti mein daalne se lambe samay tak poshak tatva deta rehta hai. Yeh liquid jeevamruta ka solid version hai.
ingredients:
- 100 kilo desi gaay ka gobar
- 1 kilo besan
- 1 kilo gur
- 1 muthi mitti
- Gaumutra zaroorat ke hisaab se
steps:
1. Gobar mein besan milayein
2. Gur ko thoda paani ya gaumutra mein ghol kar dalein
3. Ek muthi mitti milayein
4. Haath se achhe se milayein — itna gaumutra dalein ki gobar geela rahe par behne na lage
5. Chhaya mein 48 ghante rakhein — kapde se dhakein
6. Phir dhoop mein sukha lein
7. Tod kar chhote tukde bana lein
usage:
- 100 kilo ghana jeevamruta per acre
- Buwai se pehle mitti mein milayein
- Ya paudhe ki jad ke paas rakhein
- Paani dene par dheere-dheere ghulta rehta hai
- 3 mahine tak asar rehta hai

title: Mulching (आच्छादन / मल्चिंग)
what: Mulching matlab mitti ko sukhi ghas, pattiyon ya parali se dhakna. Isse mitti geeli rehti hai, ghas nahi ugti, aur jeevaanu badhte hain.
ingredients:
- Sukhi ghas ya parali
- Gire hue patte
- Ganne ki patti
- Ya koi bhi sukha organic padaarth
steps:
1. Paudhon ke aas-paas 3-4 inch moti layer bichhayen
2. Tane se 2 inch door rakhein (tana sadna nahi chahiye)
3. Poori kyari ya khet dhak dein
4. Jaise-jaise gale, upar aur daalte rahein
usage:
- Sabziyon ki kyari mein zaroor karein
- Baarish ke mausam mein thoda kam rakhein (zyada geela na ho)
- Garmi mein bahut zaroori — paani 50% bachta hai
- Mulch ke neeche keede bhi kam aate hain
- 2-3 mahine mein mulch gal kar khad ban jaata hai

title: Trichoderma (ट्राइकोडर्मा)
what: Trichoderma ek achha fungus hai jo bure fungus ko marta hai. Yeh mitti ke rogon se fasal ko bachata hai — jaise wilt, root rot, blight.
ingredients:
- Trichoderma powder (kisi bhi organic dukaan ya KVK se lein)
- Sadi gobar ki khad
- Paani
steps:
Mitti upchar:
1. 1 kilo trichoderma + 25 kilo sadi gobar khad milayein
2. Thoda paani chidak kar geela karein
3. 7 din chhaya mein rakhein
4. Khet mein buwai se pehle milayein

Spray:
1. 500gm trichoderma + 50 litre paani
2. Achhe se milayein
3. Pattiyon aur mitti par spray karein
usage:
- Buwai se pehle mitti mein milayein
- Rog dikhne par spray bhi karein
- Har mausam shuru hone par ek baar zaroor milayein
- Beej upchar: 10gm per kilo beej mein milayein
- Chemical fungicide ke saath NAHI use karein — trichoderma mar jayega

title: Vermicompost / Kechua Khad (केंचुआ खाद)
what: Kechua khad sabse badiya organic khaad hai. Keechue kachre ko best quality khaad mein badalte hain jo mitti ko upajaau banati hai.
ingredients:
- Gobar (sada hua, 15 din purana)
- Sabzi ke chhilke, ghas, sukhe patte
- Eisenia fetida keechue (laal keechue — KVK ya market se)
- Bori ya cement ka tank
- Paani
steps:
1. Tank ya gaddhe mein pehle sukhi pattiyon ki teh lagayein
2. Upar sada hua gobar 6 inch rakhein
3. Keechue chhodein (1 kilo per 1 quintal kachre mein)
4. Upar geeli bori ya patte rakhein
5. Har 2-3 din mein paani chhidkein — geela rakhen par behne na dein
6. Dhoop se bachayein — chhaya mein rakhein
7. 45-60 din mein tayar
usage:
- 2-3 tonne per acre khet mein milayein
- Paudhe ki jad ke paas daalein
- Gamla ya kyari mein 30% vermicompost milayein
- Paani ke saath ghol kar spray bhi kar sakte hain (vermi wash)

title: Green Manure / Hari Khaad (हरी खाद)
what: Hari khaad matlab kuch paudhe ugakar unhe mitti mein mila dena. Isse mitti mein nitrogen badhta hai aur mitti ki sehat sudharti hai.
ingredients:
- Dhaincha ya Sanai ke beej
- Ya moong/lobia ke beej
- Paani
steps:
1. Main fasal se 30-40 din pehle dhaincha ya sanai boyein
2. Paani dein jaise normal fasal ko
3. 30-40 din baad (phool aane se pehle) khet mein jot dein
4. 15 din baad main fasal boyein
usage:
- 1 acre mein 20-25 kilo dhaincha beej boyein
- Kharif fasal se pehle karein (April-May)
- 1 acre hari khaad = 20-25 kilo nitrogen mitti mein
- Har saal karein — 3 saal mein mitti bahut achhi ho jayegi
- Chemical khaad ki zaroorat khatam ho jayegi

title: Amrut Mitti (अमृत मिट्टी)
what: Amrut mitti ek special tarika hai jisme gobar, gaumutra aur organic padaarthon se nutrient-rich mitti banayi jaati hai nursery ya khet ke liye.
ingredients:
- 1000 kilo sookhi pattiyan / parali / organic kachara
- 100 kilo gobar
- Gaumutra zaroorat anusar
- Mitti
steps:
1. Zameen par 1 foot gahra gaddha khodein (10x10 foot)
2. Pehle sukhi pattiyan / parali ki 1 foot teh lagayein
3. Upar gobar ki patli layer dein
4. Gaumutra chhidkein
5. Aur pattiyan, phir gobar, phir gaumutra — layers banate jayein
6. Sabse upar mitti ki teh
7. Paani chhidkein — geela rakhein
8. Jute ki bori se dhakein
9. 3-4 mahine mein tayar
usage:
- Nursery ki mitti ke roop mein use karein
- Gaddhe mein paudha lagane ke liye
- Kumhla rahi fasal ke liye mitti mein milayein
- Bahut upajaau hoti hai — thodi matra mein bhi asar dikhata hai

title: Buttermilk / Chhaach Spray (छाछ स्प्रे)
what: Chhaach spray ek powerful fungicide hai jo powdery mildew aur fungal rogon ko rokta hai. Bilkul muft hai — ghar mein ban jaata hai.
ingredients:
- 1 litre khatti chhaach (buttermilk — jitni purani utni achhi)
- 10 litre paani
steps:
1. Purani chhaach lein (2-3 din purani best hai)
2. 10 litre paani mein milayein
3. Achhe se hilayein
4. Seedha spray pump mein bharein
5. Chhanane ki zaroorat nahi
usage:
- Powdery mildew ke liye sabse achha ilaaj
- Har 3-4 din mein spray karein jab tak rog na jaye
- Pattiyon ke upar aur neeche dono taraf spray karein
- Subah jaldi spray karein
- Prevention ke liye bhi mahine mein 2 baar spray karein

title: Dashaparni Ark (दशपर्णी अर्क)
what: Dashaparni ark 10 tarah ki kadwi pattiyon se banta hai. Yeh sabse powerful organic keetnashak hai — lagbhag sabhi keedon par kaam karta hai.
ingredients:
- Neem ki pattiyan — 5 kilo
- Karanj ki pattiyan — 2 kilo
- Sitaphal ki pattiyan — 2 kilo
- Datura ki pattiyan — 2 kilo
- Aak/Madar ki pattiyan — 2 kilo
- Tulsi — 1 kilo
- Sada hua gobar — 3 kilo
- Gaumutra — 5 litre
- Green mirchi paste — 500gm
- Lehsun paste — 250gm
- 200 litre paani
steps:
1. Sabhi pattiyan koot lein ya chhoti kar lein
2. 200 litre paani ke drum mein dalein
3. Gobar aur gaumutra milayein
4. Mirchi aur lehsun paste dalein
5. Achhe se hilayein
6. Kapde se dhak kar 30 din ke liye rakh dein
7. Har 3 din mein ek baar hilayein
8. 30 din baad chhan kar use karein
usage:
- 3-5% ghol bana kar spray karein (30-50ml per litre paani)
- Har 15 din mein spray karein
- Sabhi tarah ke keedon par kaam karta hai
- Sham ko 5 baje ke baad spray karein
- Bahut teekha hota hai — haathon par gloves pehnen

title: Gaumutra Ark (गौमूत्र अर्क)
what: Gaumutra ark desi gaay ke mutra se banta hai. Yeh fungus aur keede dono se ladta hai aur paudhe ki immunity badhata hai.
ingredients:
- 10 litre desi gaay ka taza gaumutra
- Distillation setup (matka + nali + bartan) ya seedha use karein
steps:
Seedha use (aasan tarika):
1. 1 litre gaumutra + 10 litre paani milayein
2. 48 ghante rakhein
3. Chhan kar spray karein

Ark banana (zyada asar):
1. Gaumutra matka mein dalein
2. Dheemi aag par garam karein
3. Bhaap ko nali se doosre bartan mein collect karein
4. Yeh concentrated ark hai
usage:
- Seedha ghol: 10% (100ml per litre paani) spray karein
- Ark: 5% (50ml per litre paani)
- Har 10-15 din mein spray karein
- Fungal rogon mein bahut asar karta hai
- Subah jaldi spray karein

title: Fasal Chakra (फसल चक्र / Crop Rotation)
what: Fasal chakra matlab ek hi khet mein alag-alag mausam mein alag fasal ugana. Isse mitti ki sehat bani rehti hai aur rog kam aate hain.
ingredients: - Koi extra cheez nahi chahiye — sirf planning
steps:
1. Pehle mausam: Anaaj wali fasal (gehu, dhaan, makka)
2. Doosre mausam: Daal wali fasal (chana, moong, arhar)
3. Teesre mausam: Sabzi ya tel wali fasal (sarson, tamatar)
4. Chauthe mausam: Hari khaad wali fasal (dhaincha, sanai)

Niyam:
- Ek hi fasal lagatar 2 mausam mat lagayein
- Daal ke baad anaaj lagayein — nitrogen milta hai
- Gehri jad wali ke baad chhoti jad wali lagayein
ready_in: Yeh ek niyam hai — har mausam follow karein
usage:
- 3 saal mein mitti ki sehat 50% badhegi
- Rog 60-70% kam ho jayenge
- Chemical khaad ki zaroorat kam hogi
- Paani ki zaroorat bhi kam hogi
- Yeh natural farming ka sabse zaroori niyam hai

title: Sah-Fasal / Intercropping (सह-फसल)
what: Sah-fasal matlab do ya zyada faslon ko saath mein ugana. Ek fasal doosri ki raksha karti hai aur mitti ko bhi fayda hota hai.
ingredients: - Do ya zyada compatible faslon ke beej
steps:
Achhe jode (combinations):
1. Tamatar + Genda (marigold) — genda keede ko bhagata hai
2. Makka + Lobia — lobia nitrogen deta hai
3. Ganna + Methi — methi mitti dhakti hai
4. Mirchi + Dhaniya — dhaniya useful keedon ko bulata hai
5. Pyaaz + Gajar — ek doosre ke keede bhagati hain

Kaise karein:
- Main fasal ki kataaron ke beech mein saathi fasal lagayein
- 2:1 ya 3:1 ratio rakhein (main:saathi)
ready_in: Normal fasal ke saath hi ugta hai
usage:
- Keede 40-50% kam hote hain
- Do faslon ki aay milti hai
- Mitti ki urvarta badhti hai
- Paani kam lagta hai
- Natural farming mein yeh bahut zaroori hai
